LAW AND MOTION, 302, THIS MATTER WAS CALLED AT 9:55 AM, 11:32 AM AND 12:50 PM. THERE IS NO APPEARANCE AT EACH CALLING OF THE CASE. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-22-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

This matter was called at 9:55 am, 11:32 am and 12:50 pm. There is no appearance at each calling of the case. The Court rules as follows: Denied. The Court further orders $150 be withheld from debtor's earnings per pay period until the debt is satisfied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
